$comment: Validation limits both languages must agree on. voyalier-core's parity_limits_match_the_contract holds the Rust constants to this file; @voyalier/contracts' parity.test.ts holds the TypeScript ones. Change a limit and both fail until both sides follow. Every value counts characters (Unicode scalar values), never UTF-16 code units — count with [...text].length in TypeScript, not text.length.
